name: Tweakpane

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of a hand-written row of inputs when you need a dense parameter panel for numbers, colors, booleans, 2D points, and intervals, because native implementations fail on compound-value controls, collapsible organization, and a consistent fine-tuning experience.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can only write loose range/checkbox controls, not compact and consistent point2d, color, interval, folder, and state snapshots; Tweakpane keeps bound values in the same parameter object.

data_in.note: params is the object bound in place; bindings only declares which keys to expose and their numeric constraints. Do not put callbacks into data.

bindings.min?: number -- no lower bound by default
bindings.max?: number -- no upper bound by default
bindings.step?: number -- selected automatically upstream from the value range by default

when_to_use: 需要高密度参数面板处理数值、颜色、布尔、二维点与区间时用它,而非手写一排 input——原生在复合值控件、折叠组织和一致的微调体验上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能写松散的 range/checkbox,做不到紧凑且一致的 point2d、color、interval、folder 与状态快照;Tweakpane 将绑定值持续留在同一个参数对象中。

data_in.note: params 是被原地绑定的对象;bindings 只声明要暴露哪些键及数值约束,不要把回调塞进数据。

bindings.step?: number —— 默认由上游按值域自动决定

boot.widget: unsupported:Tweakpane 4.0.5 的 embedStyle() 无条件把 data-tp-style 写入 document.head;即使节点落 shadowRoot,head 规则也不会跨 shadow,不满足 widget 零足迹/铁律 2。

uplink.widget: unsupported:本版本无法满足 shadow 样式隔离,不要以复制 head 样式的临时补丁冒充支持。
uplink.codex: 消费 AI 自行读取 data.params 或 pane.exportState(),再调用 sendFollowUpMessage。
uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;提供 data.params 或 pane.exportState() JSON 下载导出兜底。

carriers.widget: unsupported:运行时强制 document.head 样式注入,与 shadow 零足迹约束冲突
carriers.codex: supported:sandbox iframe 隔离了 document.head 注入

isolation.evidence: +esm contains `data-tp-style`; Tweakpane's embedStyle appends a `<style data-tp-style>` to document.head unconditionally at Pane construction — head rules do not cross into shadow, so this disqualifies the zero-footprint widget (exactly the entry's claim). 12x `ownerDocument` + mousedown/mousemove/mouseup/mouseleave are transient slider-drag listeners (added on press, removed on release). `body.appendChild` exists only on the default-wrapper branch, NOT taken because boot passes `container: el`.
